programme.title: Young Guns
programme.desc: In a lawless and violent time, six young outcasts are hired by an English merchant as 'regulators' to guard his ranch against the mob, a corrupt and powerful ring.

programme.title: Out of the Furnace
programme.desc: When Rodney Baze mysteriously disappears and law enforcement doesn't follow through fast enough, his older brother Russell takes matters into his own hands to find justice.

programme.title: Lars and the Real Girl
programme.desc: Lars Lindstrom is an akwardly shy young man in a small town who finally brings home the girl of his dreams to his brother and sister-in-law's home. The only problem is that she's not real - she's a sex doll.

programme.title: A Haunted House
programme.desc: When Malcolm’s (Marlon Wayans) girlfriend moves into his house, he soon discovers the love of his life is possessed by an evil spirit. Malcolm enlists the help of Father Williams (Cedric the Entertainer) to exorcise the demon from his girlfriend.

programme.title: Dirty Rotten Scoundrels
programme.desc: The south of France. Two rival con men -- one is suave and sophisticated, the other is a third-rate American hustler -- make a wager.

programme.title: Fatal Instinct
programme.desc: Carl Reiner directs this side-splitting spoof that stars Armand Assante, Sean Young and a host of familiar faces in a series of suspense and thriller parodies.

programme.title: Toy Soldiers
programme.desc: When Colombian drug kingpin Enrique Cali (Jesse Doran) is extradited to the U.S., his son, Luis (Andrew Divoff), devises a ruthless plan to win his freedom. Rating: R

programme.title: The Baby
programme.desc: Twisted family drama with shocking horror elements.

programme.title: Messiah Of Evil
programme.desc: A surreal, Lovecraftian horror gem.

programme.title: Scalps
programme.desc: The commander of a Texan fort in the Civil War refuses to surrender to the Northerners, and tries to buy the local Indian tribe chief's daughter.

programme.title: One Eyed Jacks
programme.desc: After robbing a Mexican bank, Dad Longworth takes the loot and leaves his partner Rio to be captured but Rio escapes and searches for Dad in California. Starring: Marlon Brando, Karl Malden, Pina Pellicer

programme.title: The Light of Western Stars
programme.desc: Ranch foreman wrongly accused of murder.

programme.title: Firewalker
programme.desc: Two hapless soldiers of misfortune (Chuck Norris, Louis Gossett Jr.) meet a beautiful girl (Melody Anderson) with a map to a lost gold mine and decide to have one last shot at striking it rich. But the trail to the treasure is no yellow brick road!

programme.title: Double Impact
programme.desc: Identical twins are separated at six months and raised on different continents. They reunite twenty-five years later to avenge the murder of their parents and reclaim their stolen family fortune.

programme.title: Invasion U.S.A.
programme.desc: An army of terrorist mercenaries led by Soviet agent Rostov catches America unprepared and makes it a war zone from sea to shining sea. Only one man can stem the rising tide of violence: retired agent and martial arts expert Matt Hunter.

programme.title: Red
programme.desc: Multi-award winning actor Brian Cox plays reclusive Avery Ludlow, a small-town shop owner whose only reason for living is his dog, Red.

programme.title: Dressed to Kill
programme.desc: A psycho-killer stalks two New York City women--one a frustrated housewife, the other a street-smart hooker who teams up with the first woman's son to trap the murderer. The film reaches a shocking climax when the slayer's real identity is revealed.

programme.title: Redirected
programme.desc: Starring Hollywood hard man Vinnie Jones, "Redirected" follows four friends turned first-time robbers who accidentally get stranded in a middle-of-nowhere Eastern European country.

programme.title: Earthling
programme.desc: After a mysterious atmospheric event, a small group of people wake up to realize that their entire lives have been a lie. They are in fact aliens disguised as humans. Now they have to make a choice. Live amongst men, or try to find a way back home.

programme.title: eXistenZ
programme.desc: During a closed-door demonstration of her new virtual reality video game, brilliant game designer Allegra Geller survives an attempt on her life by a crazed assassin. Starring: Jude Law, Jennifer Jason Leigh, Ian Holm, Willem Dafoe, Don McKellar

programme.title: A.I. Rising
programme.desc: The relationship between a human and android spirals out of control with shocking consequences.

programme.title: Adventures Of The Wilderness Family
programme.desc: The story of a modern-day family who became bored with the hassles of the city life in Los Angeles and moved to the Rocky Mountains, never to return.

programme.title: Switched
programme.desc: Tired of being bullied, Cassandra Evans prays that her nemesis, Katie Sharp, the queen bee of social media, would know what it's like to walk a day in her shoes. Her prayer is answered in an unexpected way when they get "Switched."

programme.title: The Dark Crystal
programme.desc: On another planet in the distant past, a Gelfling embarks on a quest to find the missing shard of a magical crystal, and to restore order to his world.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Tanker driver Sludge tries to dodge disaster and Macca McReady hits rough weather.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Steve finds himself up the creak without a paddle on a desert island delivery.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Jonny Rayner must take on a crocodile-infested river or delay his critical run.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Jared and Johnny's epic mission grinds to a halt and Turbo is flagged down by the police.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Carl Andrews handles a gargantuan load, and Russell's mobile classroom gets shaken.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Christian racks up massive mileage with a huge load.

programme.title: Killer Party
programme.desc: Three teenage thieves infiltrate a mansion dinner party secretly hosted by a group of recovering murderers for the social elite.

programme.title: Pennywise: The Story Of IT
programme.desc: Exploring the 1990 mini-series, based on Stephen King's iconic novel IT, this documentary tells a story heard by few.

programme.title: Claw
programme.desc: Two friends forced to spend the night in a ghost town find themselves hunted by a prehistoric predator.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The team investigates after a cowboy is found dead at a rodeo and his girlfriend is killed

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Grissom and team must investigate the deaths of several witnesses for a grand jury case.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate the disturbing death of a three-year-old girl.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A man known to the CSIs becomes a key suspect in a murder investigation.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A shocking event during an arrest leads the CSIs to a series of bizarre deaths.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When a famous sitcom actress is murdered, the CSIs travel to LA.

programme.title: Scorpion: Crime Every Mountain
programme.desc: As Cabe's trial looms over Team Scorpion, a simple case goes sideways when they help a father and his daughter whose plane crashes nearby.

programme.title: Scorpion: Who Let the Dog Out ('Cause Now It's Stuck in a Cistern)
programme.desc: As Team Scorpion anxiously awaits the verdict of Cabe's trial which could send him to prison, they focus their nervous energy on trying to save a dog stuck in a cistern.

programme.title: Scorpion: A Christmas Car-Roll
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, when Walter chooses work over spending quality time with his friends, he falls down the stairs and hits his head, and as he lays unconscious, he enters a dream world where Team Scorpion never existed.

programme.title: Scorpion: The Bunker Games
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must work with Toby's nemesis, Quincy Berkstead and his wife, Amy , when they are locked inside an artificially intelligent doomsday bunker that aims to kill them.

programme.title: Scorpion: Lighthouse of the Rising Sun
programme.desc: A solar storm knocks out power in Los Angeles, and Team Scorpion must help a teen pilot and his girlfriend who are lost over the Pacific without navigation or radio contact.

programme.title: Scorpion: Wave Goodbye
programme.desc: Team Scorpion must prevent an incoming tsunami from hitting a vulnerable nuclear power facility, and Toby secretly helps his ex-fiancée retrieve her stolen identity.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Brotherhood
programme.desc: Dov and Gail work together under Swarek’s expert tutelage in a stake-out operation to stop an Asian gang from killing a snitch.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Best Laid Plans
programme.desc: 15 Division’s hunt for an armed robber leads them to the scene of a horrible car accident. While Andy deals with a woman pinned in her car, the other officers must track and apprehend the fugitive

programme.title: Rookie Blue: A Little Faith
programme.desc: When Traci and Andy are sent out on an undercover training exercise, they stumble upon a young woman who is about to die of an overdose. Meanwhile, Dov finds himself on a “ride-along” with a drug dealer and old friend of his deceased brother

programme.title: Rookie Blue: On The Double
programme.desc: When Gail Peck’s uniform is stolen, the rookies go after a vigilante who is impersonating a police officer. Meanwhile, Swarek’s off the grid, trying to get information out of former crime enforcer Jamie Brennan

programme.title: Rookie Blue: God’s Good Grace
programme.desc: While Swarek is brutally interrogated by Jamie Brennan in the basement of a Pickering farmhouse, the rookies help Andy solve a mystery that may reveal Swarek’s location

programme.title: Rookie Blue: The First Day of the Rest of Your Life
programme.desc: When a mysterious young girl vanishes from the scene of a multi-car accident, Andy McNally connects the girl to a 7-year-old cold case.

programme.title: Dinoshark
programme.desc: A prehistoric shark unfreezes from an Arctic glacier and finds a feeding ground full of tourists and locals near Puerto Vallarta, Mexico.

programme.title: Dinocroc vs. Supergator
programme.desc: A biotech company creates two gigantic reptiles in a secret island laboratory. When the massive creatures escape, an undercover investigator, a Fish and Game officer and a swamp hunter team up to track down and kill the beasts.

programme.title: Camel Spiders
programme.desc: American forces in the Middle East deal with large spiders that carry a deadly paralyzing sting. The menace follows them home when the lethal arachnids begin appearing in the southwestern deserts of the United States, preying on humas.

programme.title: The Long and the Short and the Tall
programme.desc: A British sonic warfare patrol capture a Japanese scout in the Burmese jungle, but as they decide his fate they lose all contact with their commanding forces.

programme.title: Don't Bother to Knock
programme.desc: A flirtatious travel agent gives all his girlfriends keys to his flat, which seemingly backfires.

programme.title: The Flying Scotsman
programme.desc: Engine driver Bob is due to retire, and on his second to last day he reports Crow, a disgruntled fireman, for drinking at work which leading to his dismissal. The sacked man decides to get his revenge, vowing to kill Bob on his final run.

programme.title: Dublin Nightmare
programme.desc: Irish nationalists plan to seize a security van to raise money for their movement. A photographer begins to investigate the raid and one of his friends pays a price for their actions.

programme.title: Ross Kemp: Mafia and Britain
programme.desc: Ross starts his journey under the arches of Blackfriars bridge in London. In 1982, under this bridge a man was found. He had apparently hanged himself. The man was Roberto Calvi, better known as “God’s Banker".

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Historian Dan Jones visits the South East of England, home to Britain's greatest defensive fortress: Dover Castle.

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Dan Jones is exploring one of the oldest, and most fearsome castles ever built: The Tower of London.

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: This time Dan Jones is in the heart of the English countryside exploring Warwick Castle.

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Join Historian Dan Jones as he travels back in time to explore Caernarfon Castle.

programme.title: True Justice
programme.desc: Elijah Kane is prepping his team for court in Nicoli Putin's murder trial when they’re ambushed by Nicoli’s highly trained menout to stop Kane’s team from testifying.

programme.title: True Justice
programme.desc: Following the attack on his precinct, Kane buries his friends and sets his sights on avenging their deaths. He assembles a new team and follows the trail across the border to Vancouver.

programme.title: The Border
programme.desc: MI-6 Agent Charlotte Bates escorts a Tamil gang member to Toronto for his son’s life-saving surgery. In return, the man will testify, in a British court, against a leading terrorist.

programme.title: The Border
programme.desc: With global warming, the Arctic has become navigable, and the race to claim it heats up. As a four-nation conference on the issue unfolds in Toronto, a faraway collision under the polar ice turns a group of Canadian sailors into bargaining chips.

programme.title: The Border
programme.desc: ICS discovers that toxic sludge is being trucked across the border and dumped in the Canadian wilderness. They follow a trail to a vicious criminal gang, who gain control over Gray and his father.

programme.title: The Border
programme.desc: Kessler and Carver hover near death while Gray hunts down Layla’s killers.

programme.title: The Pamela Principle 2
programme.desc: A middle-aged married man has a steamy affair with a model who leads him dangerously astray.

programme.title: Animal Instincts: The Seductress
programme.desc: Sexual desires are mutually fulfilled when a voyeuristic music promoter (James Matthew) pretending to be blind encounters an alluring exhibitionist (Wendy Schumacher).

programme.title: The Love Garden
programme.desc: A journalist becomes entangled in a passionate love triangle after falling for his neighbor, who is already in a relationship with another woman.

programme.title: JAG: The One That Got Away
programme.desc: Mac defends and Turner prosecutes in the case of a special op marine who, during an Iraqi mission, may have deserted his team for his own survival. Harm takes on a CIA training assignment in a mach six craft that soon has him in danger.

programme.title: JAG: Close Quarters
programme.desc: Back at JAG, Harm is flooded with cases but still wants to help out an 80-year-old veteran accused of robbery. Meanwhile, Turner takes on an assignment in a sub whose crew has rescued possible defecting North Koreans.

programme.title: JAG: Posse Comitatus
programme.desc: Harm and Mac argue the case of a Marine pilot who used force to interfere with a local police matter that led to a man’s killing. Roberts is the investigating officer in the matter of a Navy doctor who is requesting conscientious objector status.

programme.title: JAG: The Boast
programme.desc: When an unwitting corporal boasts to a reporter that he killed an Iraqi prisoner of war, facts begin to emerge that could convict him despite his later claim that he was only lying toi mpress.

programme.title: JAG: Pulse Rate
programme.desc: Harm and Mac go aboard the USS Gillcrist to determine if a seaman’s fatal accident during a routine repair was the result of a co-worker’s dereliction of duty or worse.

programme.title: JAG: Good Intentions
programme.desc: Mac defends a petty officer and former alcoholic accused of a brutal murder after a drinking binge which renders him useless in remembering details that could help him. Roberts is entangled in the case of a Navy Commander accused of embezzling funds.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: The SRU must rescue a young woman after she’s been abducted by a delusional man who insists she is his missing daughter.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: The SRU are called in to contain a riot at a maximum-security prison and begin to suspect it’s all a cover for a daring prison break.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: A bitter child custody battle sparks a critical incident and the SRU must use a risky “rolling roadblock” maneuver to rescue the children.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Team One must locate and rescue a politician before a vengeful radio shock jock kills him on the air.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: The SRU are called in to resolve a gas station robbery but discover it’s connected to a deadly crisis on a cult compound.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: Parker is lured into a trap and confronted with a deadly choice: reveal a dark secret from his past or lose his life.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Let's Make a Date, Secret, Quiz Show, Press Conference, Props, Multiple Personalities, Weird Newscasters.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Keegan Michael Key chooses between an elephant seal, massage chair tester & a robot in 'Let's Make a Date'. Special guest NFL star Vernon Davis shows us the reality of an NFL locker room. (S3, E03)

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Wayne totally breaks the Hoedown, while Brad hosts an identity-absorbing evil genius and his hideous dates in Party Quirks. Also played are Hollywood Director and Scenes from a Hat. (S11, E07)

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Padma Lakshmi returns to play Dubbing, while Heather has to choose a date between a delinquent joyriding girl, the new Bosley and a playboy octopus and Wayne sings songs of roommates. (S11, E02)

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Aisha Tyler hosts another hilarious episode of the legendary improv show featuring regulars Wayne Brady, Ryan Stiles and Colin Mochrie along with guest performer Gary Anthony Williams and star guest WWE wrestling champion Chris Jericho.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: In "Press Conference", all is not jolly in Father Christmas' household. Guest star Chris Lee joins Wayne for a 90s soul duet covering everything from canine glands to international trade. (S13, E10)

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Ryan Stiles, Sandi Toksvig, Tony Slattery and Mike McShane feature in this comedy improvisation show.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: We call 'action' on some bizarre movie scenes in "Hollywood Director" and the peformers put it all out there in "Dating Profile". Guest performers Keegan-Michael Key & Candice Accola. (S1, E03)

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Guest performer Gary chooses between some unhinged characters in "Let's Make a Date", and the cast comes up with the "World's Worst" presidential candidates. Imagine that! (S2, E21)

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Superheroes, Fixed Expressions, Old Job, New Job, Narrate, World's Worst, Props, Party Quirks.

programme.title: Matlock: The Singer
programme.desc: When a successful country music star is murdered, the promoter she fired – Steve Fisher – becomes the logical suspect.

programme.title: Matlock: The Juror
programme.desc: Matlock’s on jury duty, and the case against a man-about-town who stands to gain a fortune from his wife’s death seems airtight. Close examination of the evidence suggests otherwise to Ben.

programme.title: Matlock: The Fortune (Part 1)
programme.desc: When multi-millionaire Marvin Estes dies from an apparent suicide, leaving his fortune to supposed girlfriend Theresa LaValle, Matlock must find the missing beneficary.

programme.title: Matlock: The Fortune (Part 2)
programme.desc: When it’s discovered that a multimillionaire’s suicide is actually murder, Rick Stafford, the nephew recently cut out of his uncle’s will, is the #1 suspect. However, Matlock suspects other players in this high-stakes game of foul play

programme.title: Matlock: The Debt
programme.desc: Even though her former husband was a liar and a cheat, Leanne Matlock refuses to believe he was capable of murdering his philandering boss.

programme.title: Matlock: The Revenge
programme.desc: When testifying as a witness in a robbery case, Matlock is made to look like a fool. It soon becomes apparent that someone is playing tricks on him that threaten his credibility and safety.

programme.title: Jeff Dunham's The Cars That Drove Us
programme.desc: The DeLorean made history on screen. Off screen, the rise and fall of John DeLorean’s company is a story with more twists and turns than any Hollywood movie.

programme.title: Jeff Dunham's The Cars That Drove Us
programme.desc: The Trans Am pushed muscle cars to the limit, becoming a hero of film (Smokey and the Bandit) and television (Knight Rider). But in chasing greatness, did PonGac push too far?

programme.title: Jeff Dunham's The Cars That Drove Us
programme.desc: Acer just two years, GM was ready to kill the CorveKe. But a rogue group of engineers defied orders, working in secret on what would become America’s Sports Car.

programme.title: Jeff Dunham's The Cars That Drove Us
programme.desc: Every car line has an iconic year — the ’57 Chevy, the ’69 Camaro, and of course the ’89 Batmobile, a revoluGonary model inspired by — and nearly destroyed by — Tim Burton.

programme.title: Jeff Dunham's The Cars That Drove Us
programme.desc: When the US military needed a stronger, tougher tactical vehicle, the answer was the Hummer. But could it survive Beverly Hills? With Schwarzenegger at the wheel, it just might.

programme.title: Jeff Dunham's The Cars That Drove Us
programme.desc: The Meyers Manx Dune Buggy was a garage-built experiment turned cultural icon. But would the surfer success story drown in a flood of copycats?

programme.title: Jeff Dunham's The Cars That Drove Us
programme.desc: Factory opGons offered drivers the comforts of home. While the cupholder was a home run, there were plenty of head-scratchers, from record players to dashboard coffee pots.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Transformers
programme.desc: In the 1980s, Hasbro needed a hit toy line. Transforming robots were hot in Japan, but to succeed in the U.S., they needed a backstory. Enter Marvel Comics!

programme.title: Wreckers
programme.desc: Wreckers is an evocative drama that examines the fragile relationship between truth, intimacy and betrayal.

programme.title: Ice and the Sky
programme.desc: A chronicle of the professional and emotional journey of scientist Claude Lorius, who left in 1957 to study the Antarctic ice and is regarded as the first person to discover global warming and prove its existence.

programme.title: The Truth
programme.desc: Starring Catherine Deneuve, Juliette Binoche and Ethan Hawke. About a stormy reunion between a daughter and her actress mother, Catherine, against the backdrop of Catherine's latest role in a sci-fi picture as a mother who never grows old.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Victimless Crime
programme.desc: Cagney (Sharon Gless) and Lacey (Tyne Daly) must investigate the death of a porno film star who died during a film production. However, their investigation is hindered by the victim's costar, who is reluctant to become their star witness.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Bounty Hunters
programme.desc: Cagney and Lacey are on the search to arrest a wanted criminal who has jumped bail. As they search for the man, they run into a bounty hunter named MacGruder (guest star Brian Dennehy), who is looking for the same man, complicating matters.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Baby Brokers
programme.desc: After an infant is abandoned, Cagney and Lacey end up deep in the world of underground baby merchants. Meanwhile, Lacey seriously considers adopting the infant. Cagney deals with a new love who doesn't approve of her profession.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Partners
programme.desc: Cagney (Sharon Gless) is injured while in the line of duty by a fleeing liquor store robber. While Cagney is out recovering, Lacey (Tyne Daly) must come to terms with working with a new, temporary, partner. Also starring Al Waxman and Carl Lumbly.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Choices
programme.desc: Cagney and Lacey must find a new witness after their key witness in a case against a shady landlord passes away. They take to canvasing the building in question in the hopes of finding a new witness before the landlord is set free.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: Princess Toadstool For President/Never Koop A Koopa
programme.desc: Princess Toadstool is fed up with Koopa and challenges him to try and win an election./Koopa announces that he is giving up being bad for good!

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Mario Meets Koop-Zilla
programme.desc: In the oriental city of Sayonara, Mario, Toad, Princess Toadstool and Luigi, who is pulling the cart Mario, Toad and Princess Toadstool are riding, are searching for a weapon that can help them defeat King Koopa, Super Sushi.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Bonkers from Yonkers
programme.desc: Mario and Co head to the Linguini Empire to attend a benefit spaghetti dinner. When they arrive, Princess and Toad are separated from the Marios and meet Koopa, who's taken over.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Too Hot to Handle
programme.desc: In Lava Land, Mario, Luigi, Toad and Princess Toadstool using a variety of floating rafts to reach an island named WakiWaki in the middle of the ocean

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Toad Warriors
programme.desc: In the badlands of Car Land, Mario, Luigi, Princess Toadstool and Toad are riding in a brown convertible car, planning on rendezvousing with several Mushroom rebels.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: The Pied Koopa
programme.desc: In Pasta Land, King Koopa uses a magical flute to lure all of the local Mushroom children away from the town, and leads them to his nearby castle.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: The Bird! The Bird!
programme.desc: While venturing in a snowy world, Toad is kidnapped by a nearsighted Birdo who is convinced that he is her missing baby.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Mario of the Deep
programme.desc: Mario, Luigi, Princess Toadstool and Toad have travelled to the underwater kingdom of Aqua Land in a submarine built from a bathtub in order to fight against BarraKoopa.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Mario and the Beanstalk
programme.desc: Desperate for cash, the Marios trade the royal cow for bean seeds. Princess scolds them, and accidentally sneezes, blowing the beans into the yard.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: Mush Rumors/The Ugly Mermaid
programme.desc: A Family of Real World Humans stray off the vacation path and find themselves lost./In an underwater battle with King Koopa and his Doom Sub, the Brothers find Mev-tropolis.

programme.title: Johnny Strange: Born to Fly
programme.desc: Follow the life and tragic death of 23-year-old Johnny Strange, the youngest person ever to summit Everest.

programme.title: Eruption: The Countdown Begins
programme.desc: In this gripping drama, a scientist is convinced that a volcanic eruption is near. He attempts to tell others.

programme.title: Tsunami: Facing the Global Threat
programme.desc: Tsunamis are so sudden and powerful that in a matter of minutes, they can wipe out a coastline.

programme.title: Boeing 737 Max: What Went Wrong?
programme.desc: How did the fastest-selling aircraft in Boeing's history, the Boeing 737 MAX, end its run in two tragedies?

programme.title: Killer Asteroid
programme.desc: Can a new generation of cutting-edge space missions face the ultimate natural disaster?

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: Richard can't refuse a bargain and his home is brimming with clearance items. Plus, Barbara reveals how her hoarding problem grew after losing her two sons.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: After hoarding herself out of her home, Judy began taking over her friend Linda's house. Now, Linda wants her out. Judy must try and clean up before she's left homeless.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: A woman lives in a backyard cat aviary while rodents infest her jam-packed home. The owner of a camera shop drives away customers with his hoarding.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: Andy and Becky feel it is their constitutional right to live however they choose, even if that's among 250 tons of hoard.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: Joanne must clear up or hand her six-year-old grandson over to authorities. Meanwhile, hotheaded hoarder Verna claims her mess is `artistic expression'.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Family Business
programme.desc: Dog and the Chapman clan start their hunt today with another well-established bail bonding family. As Dog's fame has grown, so have his responsibilities.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Van He'llsing
programme.desc: When Missy and Jase's son Reed purchases an old van to boost his music career, his parents begin to question some of his choices. Meanwhile, Willie helps Jep prepare River for a competitive wrestling league by introducing him to his friend.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Felons Interrupted
programme.desc: Dog is confronted with two alleged felons in crisis. Family and friends of these bondees are convinced that they are getting into further trouble while awaiting trial, so Dog and the posse have to bring these men back to jail.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Toad to Perdition
programme.desc: When Willie and his brothers spend too much time frog hunting, their wives challenge them to a "frogging" competition.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Let It Snow
programme.desc: Christopher is barely 21, already has a history of domestic abuse and assault, and is facing major time in a room without a view. This hunt won't be easy for Dog - the leads are few, informers and family are not forthcoming.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: RV There Yet?
programme.desc: The Robertson family takes a road trip to Liberty University where they will drop off John Luke and Mary Kate for their first year of college. Along the way, they stop in Nashville to visit Willie's friend Colt Ford.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Rush from Judgment

programme.title: Most Haunted: ACCRINGTON COURTS PT3

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Tyler & Amanda

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Rod & Ebony
programme.desc: Rod met Ebony on a dating web site four years ago, now it's time for the two to meet in person. Is Ebony who she says she is? What will happen when they meet in real life for the first time? (S1, ep9)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Stephanie & David

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Rico & Ja'Mari
programme.desc: Rico wants to move to England to care for his ailing mother, but his intense online relationship with Ja'mari, an international male model, is giving him second thoughts about leaving. (S1, ep11)

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Survivors
programme.desc: A grave threat to national security is posed when an enemy agent (Albert Paulsen) kidnaps two of the three key scientists who collectively know the formula for the cobalt bomb.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Trek
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force matches wits with a hijacker and a disloyal prison commandant.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Bank
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force is dispatched to Berlin's East Zone.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Operation Heart

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Slave pt. 1

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Trading Places
programme.desc: When an injury sidelines Allen, he stays at the shop while Ton takes Big Sis to the auction and goes rogue, ignoring Allen's advice and making risky purchases that could lose the partners a boatload of cash.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Catch My Drift?
programme.desc: The guys land a custom drift car and a luxury antiques unit that could have a one-of-a-kind pilot pistol from WWI. While trying to track down the provenance of the gun, Ton's lead foot gets them into trouble at their car sale.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Whiskey Business
programme.desc: An auction in Allen's old stomping grounds triggers memories of being a "lone wolf." The guys find a set of RC race boats and when they buy a man-cave unit full of old whiskey, a night of partying leads to some tough sales.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Reel Money
programme.desc: 1970's-era Fighting Chair used for big-game fishing; military MILES "laser tag" training system.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Chicago Grand Slam
programme.desc: 1984 Yamaha SS440 Snowmobile that introduced the revolutionary shock absorber suspension; rare autographed 1920s baseball glove; mint Hank Aaron signed baseball; authentic 1950s Robby the Robot collector toy.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hall of Fame Game
programme.desc: Allen heads to an auction with Elle, while Ton and Big Sis revamp the shop to help bring in more customers. Allen unearths a Ouija board and a set of antique basketballs, and goes toe-to-toe with an NBA Hall of Famer.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Dallas Mavericks
programme.desc: Military-grade Tomahawk cruise missile jet engine; century-old handcrafted wild west cowboy saddle; 1960s high roller's gold money.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Party Gras

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Tough as Nails
programme.desc: CJ seeks to disrupt Allen's search for serenity at a storage auction before the guy's head to a live auction to buy and sell. They uncover an unusual Marilyn Monroe statue, an industrial slip n' slide, and a bed of nails.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: To Pawn or Not To Pawn
programme.desc: On the brink of a major decision, Ton and Allen face-off with Carolyn at an auction in Covina. They win a "special effects unit" that contains big machines for crazy stunt work. The guys decide the fate of the shop.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Allen's Got Balls
programme.desc: After returning to LA, Ton & Allen head deep into hostile auction hunter territory and butt heads with a familiar old foe! They discover a driving range golf ball picker vehicle and one of the most accurate rifles ever made!

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Finale Special: Check Up With Dr. Drew

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Season 1 Unseen Moment

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Curveball

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Intensive care

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: No looking back

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A woman makes a desperate attempt to frame her friend right in front of deputies. A driver’s assortment of containers raises some questions. A man in possession of a stolen truck insists that his friend is the one at fault.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Snow Biz/Bugged
programme.desc: Winter hits Elwood City and Arthur sees dollar signs! His snow-shoveling business is booming--that is, until Buster decides to get in on the action. And, Brain can be a know-it-all, and sometimes he really bugs people.

programme.title: Arthur: D.W.'S Imaginary Friend/Arthur's Lost Library Book
programme.desc: Someone only D.W. can see has moved in with the Reads. Her name is Nadine, and she follows D.W. everywhere. Arthur is the first to get the new Scare-Your-Pants-Off book from the library. Unfortunately, he can't figure out where he put it!

programme.title: Arthur: George Scraps His Sculpture/Arthur's Big Meltdown
programme.desc: George creates a piece of art for the county-wide art show with the help of guest artist Kevin Sampson. Then, Arthur must learn how to control his temper after getting angry over a pair of sneakers!

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Tv-Free Week/Night Fright
programme.desc: The kids and parents of Ellwood City have all pledged not to watch TV for one whole week. Can they last? Then, big, brave Binky Barnes would be toast if people ever discovered he can't sleep without a night light.

programme.title: Arthur: Binky Barnes, Art Expert/Arthur's Lucky Pencil
programme.desc: It's a nightmare--Arthur and Buster have to work with Binky. On an art project! I mean, what does a bully like Binky know about art? Then, Arthur discovers the secret to success--a pencil that brings good luck to whoever possesses it.

programme.title: Arthur: Big Horns George/Bleep
programme.desc: George is inspired to write and perform his own blues song when he's introduced to the music of Koko Taylor. And, D.W. overhears a mysterious word she doesn’t know the meaning of. Can D.W. risk the consequences of blurting out <"BLEEP!">?

programme.title: Arthur: Muffy's Art Attack/Tales from the Crib
programme.desc: When Muffy sees a kinetic sculptor’s machines, she brags that she can make even better ones. Then, Vicita is upset at having to trade in her cherished crib for a big-girl bed, so D.W. shares her story of that same rite of passage.

programme.title: Arthur: The Wheel Deal/The Buster Report
programme.desc: After an injury, Brain has to spend some time using a wheelchair. Will he be able to compete in a basketball tournament for charity? The kids are assigned to write a report on someone they admire, and George picks….Buster!

programme.title: Arthur: Unfinished/D.W., Bossy Boots
programme.desc: Arthur is completely riveted by a book and can't wait to see how it ends. But the last few pages are missing! Now what? For D.W., there's nothing better than getting her own way--that is, until all her friends stop playing with her.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Imagine That!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Here Kitty, Kitty

programme.desc: When Riff meets a new friend in the park, BJ feels a little left out. BJ goes to great lengths to try to find a new friend for himself. Barney helps BJ see that we don't have to forget old friends when we make new ones.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Who's Your Neighbor?
programme.desc: Through pretend play, Barney and the children learn about their community and the people that help them live safely and happily there.

programme.desc: Desperate for decent henchmen, Shredder decides to make some minions he can rely on, and uses Krang's brain wave enhancer on a robotic foot soldier.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy gleefully discovers that he can print images taken with the ranger's camera as it's connected to a state-of-the-art printer. He decides to frame himself, but when the time comes to print his portrait, there's no more paper in the printer.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: A van pulls up to the ranger's cabin to deliver a full crate of jars of chocolate spread. While Grizzy and the Lemmings fight over a wrecking bar to open it, someone steals the crate.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: As usual, Grizzly picks the door of the Ranger's log cabin to come in and make himself comfortable, but this time it's impossible to enter. The Lemmings have requisitioned the cabin for a party and barricaded themselves inside.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings have got their hands on some white beans which have very strange properties, when mixed with soda anyone who eats them turns into a bouncing ball. Grizzy realises that if he wants to have a nap, he must get rid of the magic beans.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzly wants to get rid of the old piano in the garage at any cost, for the Lemmings love using it to make a dissonant racket. But when he notices a she-bear he's in love with likes the melody of Fur Elise, he decides to learn the piece.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings inherit a crate that fell off a Canadian army convoy transporting ultra-secret material. The case inside the crate emits a sort of laser beam that divides objects into multiple miniaturised versions of themselves.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Near the supermarket, a machine hands out surprise eggs in exchange for a coin. Amongst the lots to be won, there is a super firework rocket the Lemmings dream of.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: An old metal box found by chance in a recess of a cliff brings back childhood memories for Grizzy and the Lemmings.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy struggles to watch a documentary on salmon fish, nice and comfy on the sofa, as the Lemmings play chemistry novices with a fun experiment box.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy's TV remote control is stolen by a partridge who collects high-tech objects in his nest perched high up in a tree. This is a case of absolute urgency.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy has got it into his head to offer a butterfly to the bear he's in love with. But the Lemmings fight with him over the rare specimens he's spotted.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings have discovered an addictive new game based on the astonishing bouncing properties of the ranger's new running shoes.

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings

programme.title: Murdertown: Pontypridd
programme.desc: In 2014, a woman goes missing after a night drinking in the local pubs. CCTV finds her walking home arm in arm with another drinker. He just happens to be a former butcher. Police soon realise he has put his trade to use by dismembering his victim.

programme.title: Murdertown: Tamworth
programme.desc: In 1994, a gang kill a woman who manages a building society and tie up her husband, before robbing the building society of large sums of cash. But despite making a tearful plea for help, the injured husband’s story doesn’t tally.

programme.title: Murdertown: Watford
programme.desc: In 2000, a young woman is stabbed to death while walking her dog in a picturesque park in the town. A suspect is seen running semi-naked across the M1 motorway. It takes detectives weeks to identify the killer as a local man called Leon Amos.

programme.title: Murdertown: Huddersfield
programme.desc: In 2014 a sex offender called Robert Hind goes missing from a bail hostel. Cops fear he’s absconded to commit crime. The town is scoured. But then the cops learn that the sex offender hasn’t absconded - he’s been murdered.

programme.title: Murdertown: Sunderland
programme.desc: Throughout the early '90s young boys would be found dead after sniffing glue and being trapped in derelict buildings which caught fire. Cops soon found they were actually being systematically murdered by a man called Steven Grieveson.

programme.title: Murdertown: Brighton
programme.desc: In 2015 a man visits a tarot card reader. Within an hour she’s dealt out the death card and he’s confessed to a murder. When cops arrive they discover he’s been living at home with his victim’s body for days.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Tia Young
programme.desc: George Young worked his fingers to the bone to give his loved ones a better future: his wife, Tia, their three sons, even his friend Tim Lee. How was this generosity repaid? With deception, infidelity, and a plot to cash in on his death.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Chacey Poynter
programme.desc: Bob Poynter was old enough to be Chacey’s father. And he was married. But those were minor obstacles to her. However, when their romance hit the skids, Chacey enlisted yet another of her lovers to help bring the marriage to a brutal end.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: David Clark
programme.desc: Melanie and David Clark’s marriage was the definition of toxic. He was controlling and angry, and she had affairs. They seemed unable to tear themselves apart - until one violent incident ended their marriage for good.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Nat Fraser
programme.desc: Arlene McInnes and Nat Fraser had a whirlwind romance, marrying and having their first child within 18 months of meeting. But Nat soon revealed himself as a womanising, violent bully. When she rebelled against him, he hatched a plot to punish her.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Brian Burns
programme.desc: Brian and Carla Burns were both medics in their 40s when they met and fell in love. But married bliss didn’t last, and divorce proceedings were messy. Carla disappeared, and fingers pointed at Brian, but he was ready with a bizarre explanation.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Lois Riess
programme.desc: Lois and David Riess were grandparents and business owners. Lois was also a gambling addict who would do anything to feed her habit. David became the first victim of a murderous rampage that earned Lois the title of America’s most wanted grandmother.

programme.title: iCrime with Elizabeth Vargas
programme.desc: Stand Your Ground Laws/Shoplifter Falls From Overpass

programme.title: iCrime with Elizabeth Vargas
programme.desc: Arrested on Livestream Then Burglarized/Boating Under the Influence

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Prisoner of Love

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Six Degrees of Separation

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: A Virtual Nightmare

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Twist of Hate

programme.title: Ex on the Beach: Star Gazing

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 41

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Crittendon and Hogan's men try to capture Rommel, "The Desert Fox" and current commander of the Western defenses.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan has Klink believing that he is on the trail of a big prisoner-escape operation.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: LeBeau wants to escape, leaving Stalag 13 without its resident chef.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan first saves, then helps to escape, a German radio expert who the Germans want dead.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan convinces Klink that he is a great artist so that he can make a rendezvous in an art gallery.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Lord Chitterly, an English traitor who looks like the bumbling Colonel Crittendon, enters Stalag 13 with information for the Germans. Crittendon is made up to replace the Lord and fool the Germans.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Dr. Watson becomes involved in investigating the murder of Harry Chelton

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Holmes and Watson travel to the Sussex countryside to 'fish' for clues in a shotgun murder.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Each team must accurately slice a halibut into six-ounce fillets; one member of each team must work as the maître d' while the others staff the kitchen; one chef is eliminated.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay conducts a blindfold taste-test challenge to see who can distinguish pork from chicken, and potatoes from polenta.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The contestants are made to catch hens in their living room to prepare for a family-style chicken dinner service.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: On family night, the team that makes the most fresh pasta for that night's dinner service wins a day of fun at the Santa Monica Pier. An accident sends one contestant to the hospital.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The aspiring chefs compete to create the best gourmet pizza, after which the winning team will enjoy a gourmet meal in Santa Barbara and the losing team will take and deliver pizza orders.

programme.title: The Game: God Bless The Girl That's Got Her Own

programme.desc: After receiving a letter requesting PRS' help, Ryan and the team head to Ohio to help a grieving family and determine if the family's house contributed to the untimely death of a daughter.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Room & Board

programme.title: Paranormal State: Dark Man
programme.desc: A grieving mother suspects her deceased son may have fallen victim to a mysterious entity called The Dark Man.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Room 37

programme.title: Paranormal State: Death Room
programme.desc: PRS arrives in Ryan's hometown to help the new owner of an old southern plantation unearth its dark history.?A painful family secret reveals a tale of greed and neglect, and the team must help free its unwilling victim from her spiritual prison.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Devil in Syracuse
programme.desc: The clients are new, but the spirit is all too familiar as Ryan Buell prepares himself to battle the taunting demon that has been following him.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Requiem
programme.desc: A young woman named Kristy has been haunted in her own bedroom since she can remember. Now it's up to Ryan and the crew to help Kristy before she's overwhelmed by the entity.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Dwelling of the Dead

programme.title: Most Haunted: ACCRINGTON COURTS PT3
programme.desc: The third and final part of this terrifying and intriguing investigation into the paranormal activity at Accrington’s Old Police Station and Courts.

programme.desc: Yvette Fielding is back with the first part of a brand-new episode of Most Haunted. The intrepid ghost hunter has taken her team to the historic hall, which is said to be haunted by ancestral ghosts, the apparition of a white lady and a demon dog.

programme.title: Most Haunted: TOWNELEY HALL Pt2

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Ramon & Paola
programme.desc: Ramon met Paola on Facebook and established an exclusive online relationship. But after many failed attempts to video chat, is she really who he thinks she is?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Lauren & Derek

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Slave pt. 1

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Slave pt. 2

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Widow

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Seal

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Allen's Got Balls
programme.desc: After returning to LA, Ton & Allen head deep into hostile auction hunter territory and butt heads with a familiar old foe! They discover a driving range golf ball picker vehicle and one of the most accurate rifles ever made!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Louisiana Purchase
programme.desc: In Louisiana, Ton and Allen encounter some salty locals at a shipping crate auction, and navigate choppy waters at a boat auction. After spending a lot of cash, they find a tactical blast shield and a bass fishing boat.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sidecar Surprise
programme.desc: An unassuming mom in an oversized sweater tries to pull the wool over Ton & Allen's eyes at a storage auction in Arlington, VA. The guys uncover a black powder cannon designed in the 15th century & a Russian military motorcycle!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Drumming Up Cash
programme.desc: Ton & Allen face some silent but deadly competition at an auction in nearby Glendale. They discover a Zildjian brand percussion cymbal from the 1940's and a pyrotechnics control board designed for large-scale fireworks displays!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Viva la Vegas
programme.desc: 1974 death-defying Zig Zag magic sword box, an ultra-rare 1910 poster of the infamous magician Chung Ling Soo, an 1800s naval cane sword and century-old Metlach German beer steins.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Quadzilla Attacks!
programme.desc: Extreme Quadzilla ATV, the fastest 4 wheeler ever; a 1910s Remington Derringer and an 1880s Palm Squeezer pistol; revolutionary 1800s Western Electric telephone with a crank dial.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Disco and Dice
programme.desc: 1978 Williams Disco pinball machine; 1898 dice popper gambling device; talking 1990s bar top breathalyzer; deadly fishing harpoon.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Once a Pawn a Time
programme.desc: Ton and Allen discover that owning a pawn shop is way more trouble than they expected. With bills stacking up, even an antique ammo collection and some classic football helmets may not be enough to put the guys in the black.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Rock-et to Me!
programme.desc: Ton and Allen end up in a turf war at a Hollywood auction and at odds with each other over whether to gamble on what could be an antique slot machine. Allen attempts to fly a jetpack.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Big Easy Money
programme.desc: Allen & Ton head to New Orleans in search of easy money, but instead encounter some bayou bidders with big-time bucks! They discover a pair of early 19th-century dueling pistols & a vintage airboat fitted with a turbine engine!

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: No looking back
programme.desc: Leah gets the results of Ali's MRI and is relieved to find out there's nothing wrong with her brain. Meanwhile, Jenelle is spending time with Jace and finally at peace with her mum.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Home for Christmas

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard speaks with two investigative journalists and a natural health practitioner who maintain vaccines are neither safe nor effective.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Can radiation from electrical appliances, power lines, microwave ovens, and wireless technology such as cell phones, baby monitors, alter our DNA, and cause illnesses?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Alien Abductions
programme.desc: Richard speaks with two alleged alien abductees about their claims they were taken aboard an alien space craft.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: For centuries, farmers have been discovering strange, complex geometric patterns comprised of rings, circles and other intricate shapes in their fields.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard meets the owners of an abnormal humanoid skull allegedly discovered in Mexico in the 1930s and a researcher who has had the skull subjected to numerous tests including carbon-14 dating, and DNA in order to determine it’s origin.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Mystery of Oak Island
programme.desc: Richard investigates Canada's best-known mysteries, the Oak Island treasure. Also known as the money pit, the site has become one of the world's deepest and most costly archaeological digs.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Energy Healing
programme.desc: Several energy healers claim they are able to produce spontaneous miraculous healing through a laying on of hands. Claims of similar such healing by a man in a remote village in Brazil, known as John of God are also examined.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Execution of MLK and The Framing of James Earl Ray
programme.desc: In this re-examination of the assassination of civil rights leader Martin Luther King, Richard meets several researchers who provide evidence that the convicted gunman, James Earl Ray was not the real triggerman.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Birthers - Obama's Birth Certificate
programme.desc: Richard interviews several prominent 'Birthers' who present evidence that proves Barack Obama is not eligible to be President because he does not meet the qualifications of a natural born citizen.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: RFID Chips
programme.desc: Could implantable RFID chips or Radio-frequency identification tags currently in widespread use in retail industry be used to surreptitiously track and control people?

programme.title: Murder Maps: Notting Hill Horror Part 2
programme.desc: John Christie brought death to everyone around him. He managed to pin his terrible crimes on another man who would be sentenced to death. He eluded capture for years.

programme.title: Murder Maps: The Bermondsey Horror
programme.desc: In 1849, a man suddenly disappeared in Bermondsey. The discovery that he had been brutally murdered enraptured the press and the public. Even Charles Dickens was totally engrossed in the story of the sinister Marie Manning.

programme.title: Murder Maps
programme.desc: In 1911, a gun battle on the streets of London, The Siege of Sidney Street the first breaking-news story in history.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the State Hermitage Museum
programme.desc: From ancient mummies who sport tattoos to re-examining who really killed Rasputin, discover the secrets inside the State Hermitage Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Natural History Museum, London
programme.desc: From Darwin’s original specimens to a lost workshop that inspired James Bond, discover the secrets of Britain’s Natural History Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Imperial War Museum, London
programme.desc: From Churchill risking his life in the Blitz to 21st Century soldiers who become invisible, discover the secrets inside the Imperial War Museum.

programme.title: Bang Goes The Theory
programme.desc: The origins of weather; seasons allow life to form; Jem checks out wave power in Scotland.

programme.title: Bang Goes The Theory
programme.desc: Investigating the 2010 Gulf of Mexico oil disaster; Liz takes part in wildlife rescue efforts.

programme.title: Bang Goes The Theory
programme.desc: Homemade gules to test stickiness; puzzle with a scientific optical illusion; supersonic car.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: MEGAFLOODS
programme.desc: Water covers two thirds of the earth’s surface, and we are utterly dependent on it, but when this vital ingredient of life unleashes its fury on the planet it becomes the ultimate bringer of death.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: CONSTRUCTION
programme.desc: Bridges and tunnels have transformed the way we live, making the inaccessible easy to reach, and turning time consuming journeys into convenient commutes, but when things go wrong they can go very wrong indeed.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: AIR, LAND AND SEA
programme.desc: Planes, trains and ships, our mass transit systems, have had a profound effect on mankind, making the world smaller and more connected.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Juno, Cassini and Beyond
programme.desc: The Cassini space craft has completed its mission over Saturn, Juno has reached its target and has commenced its scientific observations of the giant planet Jupiter.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Slingshot
programme.desc: Sending probes throughout the solar system is a mathematicians dream and an engineers nightmare, sling shotting probes around other planets to arrive at their destination.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Living Planet
programme.desc: With continuous observation of arth from orbit scientists have built a data set over time that reveals much about how the Earth breaths and life sustains itself on this living Planet.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Cosmic Collisions
programme.desc: Cosmic and x rays, these mysterious and highly powerful particles from deep space are being investigated to finally discover where they come from.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Gravity
programme.desc: LISA pathfinder, has led the way for a space based gravity wave detector, what are gravity waves and why are they so hard to detect?

programme.title: The New Frontier: Interface
programme.desc: The Ionisphere, where the Earth interfaces with space, is little understood, it effects radio communications, GPS signals and satellites alike.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Mercury Or Bust
programme.desc: The ESA - JAXA joint Bepi-Colombo Mission is moments away from launch.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Set Course For Heart of the Sun
programme.desc: NASA’S Parker Solar Probe Mission is on its way and will be shortly followed by Europe’s Solar probe Mission.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Tickets Please
programme.desc: No spacecraft have traveled so fast or so close to a star before. It is hoped to reveal the source of the solar winds that effect us here on Earth

programme.title: Wild Italy: Top Predators: Mantis: The Queen of the Waterless River
programme.desc: This is the story of a Praying mantis which was born in the dry grasslands of Southern Italy.

programme.title: Wildest Latin America: Patagonia: The Ends of the Earth
programme.desc: Patagonia is a place of extremes  of vast ice fields and snow-capped mountains; of windswept deserts, and violent oceans. Survival here means being tough enough to cope with brutal winters, and canny enough to exploit brief seasons of plenty.

programme.title: Jungle Planet
programme.desc: The south of Africa is home to an unusual forest that loses its leaves during the dry season. The Mopane tree - or butterfly tree - is the main exponent of this behaviour.

programme.title: Wild Italy: From the Alps to Tuscany

programme.title: Wildest Arctic: Taiga: The Frozen Forest
programme.desc: Containing one third of the world's trees, the frozen forests of the Taiga are the lungs of the planet. This great forest spans across shores of the Pacific, sheltering some of the Earth's most majestic animals, and some of its most secretive.

programme.title: Wild Assassins: Camouflage
programme.desc: Welcome to the world of wild assassins, where the deadliest of predators often remain unseen.

programme.title: London: 2000 Years Of History
programme.desc: How the Crossrail will propel the capital into the future.

programme.title: Portillo's Hidden History Of Britain: Royal London Hospital
programme.desc: The Royal London Hospital pioneered medical breakthroughs.

programme.title: Portillo's Hidden History Of Britain: Orford Ness: Defence of the Realm
programme.desc: Orford Ness is a lens into an era of secrets and superpowers.

programme.title: Portillo's Hidden History Of Britain: Shepton Mallet
programme.desc: Michael Portillo explores this 400-year-old prison.

programme.title: The Flying Scotsman: The Unstoppable Flying Scotsman
programme.desc: The Flying Scotsman has broken records and starred in movies.

programme.title: The Flying Scotsman
programme.desc: The mighty Scotsman becomes stranded stateside.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Twisted Love
programme.desc: Dog is tracking down Cecilia, who's wanted for car theft, but she's nowhere to be found. Her girlfriend and co-signer has gone missing too. Just when the trail goes cold, a friend leads the team to the cosigner's empty apartment.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Where the Wild Things Are
programme.desc: Dog, Beth and the team are in Colorado and they face a special challenge - getting the kids to camp. After the drop-off, Dog is more than ready to track down a fugitive. Robin disposed of a body after a homicide, and now he's skipped his court date.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: No Luv Still
programme.desc: Dog is in search of a potentially dangerous fugitive, he's only 19 and charged with kidnapping and menacing. The case takes an unexpected turn when the Chapman clan ends up in a confrontation with the suspect's family.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Day of the Dog
programme.desc: Dog and the team are back in Colorado hunting bounties. Today's fugitive has a long rap sheet and a reputation for packing heat. With nothing but an address and phone number, the team heads out on the hunt.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Time to Cry
programme.desc: Kimo does a vanishing act for his day in court and now Dog and the posse have to find him. With precious few leads to follow Dog turns to the fugitive's on-again-off-again girlfriend, but she's initially reluctant to join the hunt.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Up on the Roof
programme.desc: Today, Dog and the family are back in Colorado and are about to make one of their most exciting captures ever. When the adrenaline-fueled arrest goes down, every family member will play a critical role.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Let It Snow
programme.desc: Christopher is barely 21, already has a history of domestic abuse and assault, and is facing major time in a room without a view. This hunt won't be easy for Dog - the leads are few, informers and family are not forthcoming.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Rush from Judgment
programme.desc: Facing hard time for forging checks, Melissa pulled a vanishing act at her sentencing hearing, bolting from the courthouse in broad daylight. Lucky for her bondsman, Dog and his posse are in Colorado and ready to help.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Statue of Imitations
programme.desc: When Willie asks a local chainsaw artist to make him a statue, he gets a big surprise when it's revealed that the statue is of an unlikely subject - Willie himself. Meanwhile, Jep and Jessica attempt to help Kay with her hoarding.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: A Decent Proposal
programme.desc: On a trip to New York, Jase's son Reed proposes to his girlfriend, which inspires his father to fan the flames of romance back home with Missy. Meanwhile, Sadie asks Willie to be a guest lecturer at her business class.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Father Knows Pest
programme.desc: The tables are turned when the HOA comes to Jase for help to rid the neighborhood of a menacing beaver. Little Will has just gotten his learner's permit, and Willie and Si argue over which of them is the better driving instructor.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Wild Wild West Monroe
programme.desc: When Jase and Jep get into an argument over which of them is the rightful heir to their grandfather's old rifle, they decide to settle the argument with a marksmanship contest. Meanwhile, Willie and Korie help Rebecca prepare for her trip to Taiwan.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Half in the Bag
programme.desc: After Si has started moonlighting as a grocery bagger, the guys show up at the store and their teasing inadvertently causes Si to lose his job and his chance to enter a local bagging competition.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: There Will Be Flood
programme.desc: When a large storm hits Monroe, most of the adults head to Phil and Kay's to help protect their house from flooding while Jess, Sadie, Rebecca and Cole babysit the kids. Meanwhile, Jep, Si, Martin and Godwin try to protect the Duck Commander.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Bingo Star
programme.desc: Willie accompanies Kay to a local bingo tournament and gets seduced by the game, eventually embarrassing himself and Kay with his enthusiasm.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Sadie's Choice
programme.desc: Willie takes Sadie on a tour of a local college in hopes of convincing her to stay nearby after her impending high school graduation.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Children of the Cornbread
programme.desc: When the Robertson brothers debate which of their wives makes the best cornbread, it escalates into a full-on cornbread cook off. Meanwhile, when Jep, Martin, and Godwin play a practical joke on Uncle Si, it ends up being Si who has the last laugh.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Whole Lotta Bull
programme.desc: The guys enjoy a one-day rodeo fantasy camp where they learn the ins and outs of riding, roping and clowning.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Here Comes the Son
programme.desc: After leaving school to pursue music, Jase feels that Reed needs some structure in his life, so he hires him to take his place at Duck Commander.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Nazis Today
programme.desc: For decades, there have been rumours key members of Hitler’s inner circle escaped the fall of Berlin - maybe even the Führer himself. But where did they go and what is their plan?

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Bio Hazard Island
programme.desc: A secret government facility may have created many of the diseases currently plaguing the world.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Zombies
programme.desc: This episode explores what would happen if a zombie outbreak ever became a reality.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Top 10 Conspiracies Of All Time
programme.desc: Those in power have secrets they do not want average citizens to know.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Stargate Portals
programme.desc: Discover doorways to wormholes in time, their secret locations around the world, as well as who is trying to open them and why.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: They’re our first line of defense in the darkest of times. And they’re often the first responders to threats from another world. Over the past 70 years the world’s military forces have come face to face with thousands of unidentified objects.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: It’s the stuff of nightmares. Emergency lines are flooded with calls as UFOs appear in the sky faster than authorities can track them.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Triangle Terror: For years, the flying saucer has been synonymous with UFO terror. But is it still the spacecraft that frightens us the most? Or has fear taken a new shape?

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Countdown To Disclosure: Evidence suggests the world's governments could be on the verge of announcing everything they know about UFOs. What will this mean for our society?

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Aliens on the Moon
programme.desc: A look at the possibility that life began on Mars and travelled to Earth. Plus, if aliens exist, what plans do they have in store for us? Experts investigate.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Battle of Okinawa
programme.desc: Kamikaze pilots guard the island of Okinawa from American forces.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Fall of Berlin
programme.desc: In 1945, Soviet and American troops press Hitler's armies from the west and the east, culminating in the fall of Berlin.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Commerce Raiders
programme.desc: Heavily armed vessels disguised as ordinary cargo ships patrolled allied waters, sinking supply boats and stealing their content.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: Bombing of Germany
programme.desc: The development of the B-17 bomber, which allowed American planes to reach inside Germany and bomb its cities.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: U-Boat War
programme.desc: U-boats posed the deadliest threat to Allied convoys traveling the Atlantic.

programme.title: Allied Commanders of WWII
programme.desc: Heroism was not unique to US commanders, these generals battled the Nazis on all fronts. A look at Bernard Law Montgomery, Georgi Zhukov, and Sir Arthur Harris.

programme.title: Allied Commanders of WWII
programme.desc: The commanders of World War II who led on the high seas and on the homefront. Charles Nimitz, George Marshall, and Joseph Stillwell are seen in profile.

programme.title: Allied Commanders of WWII
programme.desc: From Island-hopping to thirty seconds over Tokyo, this is a look at the battles of Douglas MacArthur, Hap Arnold, and James Doolittle.

programme.title: History Of Weapons: Close Combat
programme.desc: Weapons experts test the physical and psychological impact of close combat weapons - the Roman short sword, the medieval war hammer and the bayonet.

programme.title: Secret Wars Uncovered: A New Cold War
programme.desc: A New Cold War: How will the new Cold War, involving the US, Russia, the UK and China, play out? Will trade and cyber warfare be the worst of it or is military war inevitable?

programme.title: The Sound And The Fury
programme.desc: In the East, Hitler launches Operation Barbarossa and invades the Soviet Union, reaching the outskirts of Moscow. But winter and Soviet resistance break his momentum. The Red Army, boosted by relentless propaganda, put up a fierce fight.

programme.title: Secret Wars Uncovered: Russian Intervention In Georgia

programme.title: History Of Weapons: Weapons For All
programme.desc: From the crossbow to the Kalashnikov to 3D-printed firearms, weaponry designed for everyone can offer a decisive advantage in warfare.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Storm Warning

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Hell On The High Seas
programme.desc: It is week eight of the North Atlantic Bluefin tuna fishing season, and cracks are starting to show in the Gloucester fleet, with captains and crews pushing each other to the limit.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Meltdown
programme.desc: Tensions reach their breaking point amongst the Gloucester fleet as captains, mates and vessels fall apart.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Captain Carnage
programme.desc: It's a battle of wills on the North Atlantic, as two of Gloucester's top Bluefin fishermen - friends-turned-foes Paul Hebert and Dave Carraro - go head-to-head to out-fish each other.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: All Hands On Deck
programme.desc: With only four weeks left in the Atlantic Bluefin season, two boats have the challenge of novice fishermen on board – and it could make or break their season.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A woman claims she owns a dog currently being cared for by a mother and son; another woman insists that her neighbor has been mistakenly planting flowers on her property.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars

programme.title: Arthur: Unfinished/D.W., Bossy Boots
programme.desc: Arthur is completely riveted by a book and can't wait to see how it ends. But the last few pages are missing! Now what? For D.W., there's nothing better than getting her own way--that is, until all her friends stop playing with her.

programme.title: Arthur: The Director's Cut/Crime and Consequences
programme.desc: After meeting his hero, Hollywood director Tufton Sinclair, George is inspired to make a movie of his own. When George accidentally breaks the class's prize woodworking project, Binky gets unfairly blamed.

programme.title: Arthur: Carried Away/Dueling Detectives!
programme.desc: Kate and Mei Lin are thrilled to tour the solar system with Pal's cousin, Dr. Yowl. Wally is missing and Elwood City's best detective is on the case. And that detective is…Binky?!?

programme.title: Arthur: Muffy's Soccer Shocker/Brother, Can You Spare A Clarinet?
programme.desc: Muffy's proud that her dad is the new soccer coach--until he exhausts the team with demanding drills. The try-outs for the Young Person's Orchestra are coming to Lakewood Elementary and everyone agrees that Binky is a shoe-in.

programme.title: Arthur: Hic or Treat/Mr. Alwaysright
programme.desc: D.W. gets a case of the hiccups that just won't go away. Will she have them for the rest of her life and set the world record? It seems that Brain is always right about everything and it's really starting to get on Buster's nerves.

programme.title: Arthur: Sue Ellen's Lost Diary/Arthur's Knee
programme.desc: Poor Sue Ellen has lost the one thing she's never without--her diary. Then, Arthur's hurt his knee but won't tell Mom--because then she'd know he'd been playing down at the dump , where he was NOT allowed to go.

programme.title: Arthur: The Case of the Girl with the Long Face/The Substitute Arthur
programme.desc: Fern's been feeling low and no one can figure out why. Luckily, Buster Baxter is on the case! With Arthur out of town, Buster is on the hunt for a new best friend, but he only wants to play games HIS way. Will Buster learn to compromise?

programme.title: Arthur: Carl's Concerto/Too Much of a Good Thing
programme.desc: Carl has agreed to play the accordion for George's puppet show. But his routines are getting in the way of rehearsals. Buster enlists Binky's help to keep him from gorging on delicious Tuvaluna cookies. Will Buster's self-control crumble?

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Birthday/Francine Frensky, Superstar
programme.desc: Only four more days until Arthur's birthday party! But to Arthur's horror, it turns out Muffy's having her birthday party on the very same day. And, now that Francine finally has the lead in a school play, she's has become a stage tyrant.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When he tries to join some older kids in jump-roping, Daniel fails miserably. He becomes convinced that he’s just too little to do anything right.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Bonjour Barney!
programme.desc: Emma wants to paint an award-winning painting for the "Art In The Park Show," but she is just isn't satisfied with her artwork. Barney takes her to France to learn how to paint from his friend Pierre.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Spring Into Fun!
programme.desc: It's a rainy spring day, and the children can be found inside painting and creating. Barney arrives, explains the differences amongst the seasons, and suggests playing outside in the rain. The rain is soon replaced by sunshine and a rainbow.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Big Little Day
programme.desc: Barney helps Baby Bop and the children discover big and little things in the world around them. And by the end of the day, the kids have learned that big or little, they're all wonderful just the way they are!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney helps BJ see that we don't forget old friends when we make new ones. Ryan and his Grandpa have a great day in the Park.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Let's Play Games!
programme.desc: It's fun and games with Barney and his friends! BJ's favorite way of getting exercise is by playing sports and games. When Baby Bop is shy about trying new games, Barney and his friends show her how tee-rific trying something new can be.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Mother Goose - Fun With Reading
programme.desc: While playing in the caboose, BJ is surprised to learn that "The Land of Mother Goose" truly exists. Several Mother Goose characters have come to ask for help! Parts of their rhymes are missing! When Mother Goose arrives, she fixes the problem.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Today is the big dance party in the park. Barney tells Baby Bop the story of “The Princess Without a Song to Sing.”

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop's blankey seems to be getting smaller. But Barney shows her that Baby Bop is growing. Barney and his friends help Riff see the dentist is nothing to be afraid of.
